title: styphelia ramiflora
intro: Styphelia ramiflora, also known as the Tasmanian pepperbush or mountain pepper, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the family Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Styphelia ramiflora include reducing pain and inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Styphelia ramiflora can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a spice to add flavor to food.
